policy: Dukascopy is the single official data source for the active research, validation, holdout, prop simulation, and reporting pipeline. No mixing of broker sources. Old broker data lives under data/_deprecated_/ and is marked dataset_source != dukascopy; the audit and certifier reject it for active use.
instructions_to_populate: Run scripts/fetch_dukascopy.py from an environment with internet access to datafeed.dukascopy.com. See README § Dukascopy data pipeline.
